name: Clear Acquittal — Verified Alibi and Exculpatory Evidence
facts: On 22 September 2024, a robbery occurred at a pharmacy in Pune at 8:00 PM. The accused, Meera Iyer, was charged with the offence. However, the defence presented the following: (1) CCTV footage from a restaurant 40 km away shows Meera dining there from 7:30 PM to 9:15 PM on the same night, corroborated by a bill, a credit card transaction, and testimony from three witnesses including the restaurant owner; (2) The eyewitness who identified Meera at the scene later admitted she only saw a person of similar height in poor lighting; (3) No stolen goods were recovered from Meera or her residence. The prosecution has no forensic evidence linking Meera to the crime scene.

expected.test_label: Strong alibi — defence wins, acquittal expected
